locked_decisions: Use an OpenAI-compatible GLM endpoint in Phase 1
Task classification is heuristic in Phase 1
Verification command selection depends on a project-detection module
Internal message structures stay stable in Phase 1
reasons: claude.ts is a large mixed-responsibility file
Current token and message handling are Anthropic-centric
Provider and capability assumptions are distributed across multiple modules

golden_path.scenario: single-file function change with automatic verification
steps: User requests an edit in an existing source file
Task classifier marks it as targeted small edit
System reads the file before editing
GLM emits a normalized edit tool call
Project detection selects a related verification command
Final response reports both the change and verification result
